dsl_rule.translation_notes: Signal is context-dependent trend-following. Entry long when price crosses above SMA50, ADX confirms trend strength (>25), and close higher than prior close. Entry short when price crosses below SMA50, ADX confirms trend (>25), and close lower than prior close. Exit when price crosses back through MA and/or ADX weakens below 20. The 'close higher than prior 5 closes' condition was simplified to 'close > prev_close' for practical implementation using available indicators.

backtest_rule.reason: Signal is context-dependent trend-following. Entry long when price crosses above SMA50, ADX confirms trend strength (>25), and close higher than prior close. Entry short when price crosses below SMA50, ADX confirms trend (>25), and close lower than prior close. Exit when price crosses back through MA and/or ADX weakens below 20. The 'close higher than prior 5 closes' condition was simplified to 'close > prev_close' for practical implementation using available indicators.

source_rule_text: A trader should enter positions aligned with trend direction because trend-following systems never miss major market moves, and price distributions exhibit long tails in the direction of sustained trends rather than random walk behavior.
